questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: The 'Karregutta hill', which was recently in the news, is geographically situated along the border of which of the following states?
questions.explanation: Karregutta hill is the site where 'Operation Black Forest', the largest anti-Naxal operation in the region, was conducted. It is located specifically on the border between Chhattisgarh and Telangana.
questions.takeaway: Geographical locations of major security operations (like Karregutta hill for Operation Black Forest) are important for identifying conflict zones in the Red Corridor.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Operation Black Forest' is the biggest anti-Naxal operation ever conducted on Karregutta hill situated along the Chhattisgarh-Telangana border.

questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: In the context of India's internal security, 'Operation Black Forest' is primarily associated with which of the following?

options.text: A counter-insurgency drive against separatist groups in the North-Eastern states.
A tactical security operation to neutralize Naxalite influence in the Karregutta hill region.
A humanitarian assistance and disaster relief operation in the dense forests of Central India.
A special intelligence operation to dismantle urban terror modules in metropolitan cities.

questions.explanation: Operation Black Forest is specifically an anti-Naxal (Left Wing Extremism) operation conducted on Karregutta hill, which is a strategic location on the Chhattisgarh-Telangana border.
questions.takeaway: Operation Black Forest is a major tactical anti-Naxal operation in the Karregutta hill area.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: 'Operation Black Forest' is the biggest anti-Naxal operation ever conducted on Karregutta hill situated along the Chhattisgarh-Telangana border.
